title: CRM Pro - Communications
description: Client communication activity log populated by CRM Sync Hub. Contains email and meeting records with AI-generated summaries, sentiment classification, and client associations. Created via lazy DB creation on first sync.

Title.description: AI-generated summary headline of the activity (max 80 characters).

Type.description: Activity type indicating the communication channel and direction.

Date.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the activity occurred.

Contact.description: Related contact from the CRM Pro Contacts database.

Company.description: Related company from the CRM Pro Companies database.

Summary.description: AI-generated 2-3 sentence summary of the communication content.

Thread ID.description: Gmail Thread ID or Calendar Event ID for deduplication. Used as the unique key to prevent duplicate records.

Participants.description: Comma-separated list of participants in the format 'Name (Role)'.

Direction.description: Communication direction relative to the user.

Source.description: Source system the activity was synced from.

Synced At.description: Timestamp when the record was created or last updated by CRM Sync Hub.

notes: The plugin searches for this database by name ('Communications' or 'CRM - Communications') before creating it (lazy creation). Title serves as part of the compound deduplication key (Title + Date + Type). If the Thread ID property exists, exact deduplication by Thread ID/Event ID is preferred over the compound key approach. Sentiment defaults to Neutral when AI classification is ambiguous.
